Company: The name of the company that recorded the policy update, in this case, Elexion Automotive
Policy_Area: The specific area of policy the update pertains to, such as 'EV subsidies', 'safety standards', or 'import duties'
Number_of_Updates: The total number of updates recorded in the specified policy area during the specified time period
Start_Date: The start date of the period during which the updates were recorded
End_Date: The end date of the period during which the updates were recorded

Policy_Area: EV subsidies, safety standards, and import duties
